name: codebase-alignment
description: Curative + preventive codebase-alignment skills on a shared decisions-ledger core.

plugins.name: codebase-alignment
plugins.description: codebase-rescue (align an existing, misaligned codebase) + greenfield-forge (build a new one aligned from the first commit), sharing one decisions-ledger core and a researcher/executor/reviewer/measurer/brainstorm agent roster.
